text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Satono Diamond is no longer training
with her, Kitasan Black isn't doing as well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Dia... isn't here... She isn't chasing after me
anymore...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Why does everything feel so different without
her?! Urgh...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them were like inseparable sisters, so
now that her other half is missing, she clearly isn't
in top form.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer. I'm not exactly doing great, am I?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Man, and I'd made up my mind to be Dia's big
sister and everything, too...
choice_data_list: Won't that be pretty tough to do, though?
Won't that be pretty tough to do, though?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um... Well... I'd always compared myself to Dia
ever since we were little.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I always think about how I have to work harder
than Dia or what would Dia do in certain
situations... Stuff like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Satono Diamond is more than just
Kitasan Black's childhood friend. She was the
beacon that led them down the right path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No wonder Kitasan Black is having trouble staying
the course after losing a pillar like her. In which
case...
choice_data_list: Sit tight for a minute, okay?
Sit tight for a minute, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where are you heading, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I have to help her solve this
problem, and to do that...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Even Trainer's gone, too... Ngh... I'm all alone...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what to do with myself... I've always
had someone with me, but now that I'm alone...

Wahey-hey! ☆ If you're feelin' lonely, why don't
you hang with us, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Daitaku Helios?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello! Thank you for everything you did
during the freshman welcoming party!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No probs! It's been forevs since we talked! But
hey, I'm not the only one here! C'mon, fam!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm here too! Wahey-heeey! But wait, there's
more!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Turbo, reporting for duty! I'm at full throttle
today! Together we are...

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: The Breakaway Trio! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The Breakaway Trio... Oh, I get it! You call
yourselves that because you're all front runners
who are good at breaking away from the pack!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! If you've got any questions about front
running, we'll be happy to answer them!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thanks, but I'm not actually having any
trouble with my running... It's more like... I don't
know how to get out of the dumps.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Aah. I get it. Your vibes are all off, and you get
outta your funk, huh? Well, never fear, 'cause we
are here! C'mon, get hyped with us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno... I don't think "hype" is what she needs
right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't feel like a motivation
problem—you're just missing someone to run with,
I'm guessing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A-actually, yes, when you put it that way. But
how'd you know, Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Call it a hunch. You look more lost and confused
than worried and stressed, y'know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's exactly how I feel! Dia and I have
always trained together and encouraged each
other, but she can't run with me anymore...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, so that's the sitch. Well, how 'bout you hang
out with us for now? The more the merrier and
whatnot, right?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You can join us and make the Breakaway
Trio into the Breakaway Quartet! Let's get out
there and tear up the turf!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
L-like literally? That sounds pretty extreme, but
I'll do my best to keep up!
Hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who's that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm making my way back with a training partner
that should be perfect for Kitasan Black, only to
find her already surrounded by other runners.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You should come talk to us if you have troubles,
Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
T-T-Teio?! Trainer, did you leave so you could
bring Teio here?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And who's that over there?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey. Nice Nature, at your service and
whatnot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm just here for these three stooges. Ikuno told
me to send them her way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This runner is Nice Nature. She's in the same year
as Tokai Teio and is on good terms with the
Breakaway Trio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since so many Umamusume are here already, we
take advantage of the situation and discuss
Kitasan Black's next move together.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're just so by the book, Kita. I don't think
reckless strategies or running styles are your
thing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You'd get a lot more out of studying with me and
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm here in the first place 'cause your trainer feels
the same way and came to get me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So you think she should study, huh? What
do you think, Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Me? Well... Considering the options...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'd say it's better if Kita followed Teio's advice.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
But why? Kita's clearly well-suited for front
running!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I never said she wasn't, but unlike you, she
doesn't go in an all-or-nothing frenzy when she
runs.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Plus, she hasn't decided if she wants to specialize
in front running, so I think it's better for her to
learn more about running styles with Teio.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Don't you agree, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just as Nice Nature says. Kitasan Black may
have an affinity for front running, but she doesn't
run recklessly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always conscious of the racers behind her as
she keeps the lead and holds out to the end with
her tough tenacity. I want her to learn other
running styles outside of front running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's everything, nice and figured out.
The most important thing is what's best for Kita's
future, after all.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For sure! ☆ As long as Kita cheers up, then that's
all that matters!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Later, Kita! Let's hang out again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hit me up if you ever need help with anything! I'm
always happy to listen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After wrapping things up with the older
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Kita. As you may know, I am Mejiro
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, a friend of Tokai Teio and a
stayer who hails from the illustrious Mejiro family,
extends a warm welcome to us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I heard you wish to learn as much as you can from
us. Of course, we would be glad to oblige.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Spe and some others are around as well, so go
ahead and ask us for help whenever you have a
question.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well? Do you think you'll be all right hanging out
with us, even though we're upperclassmen?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Getting to learn from you and McQueen is
like a dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm Kitasan Black! As a newbie, I'm ready for
whatever initiation awaits! I'll carry your bags,
clean, and anything you want me to do!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for this opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... There's no initiation, so you don't have
to clean or anything, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's how Kitasan Black gains a new support
system and circle of friends.
